mapper.select:
select coalesce(sum(ifnull(stk.qty, 0)), 0) as totalQty, coalesce(sum(ifnull(stk.amt, ifnull(stk.qty, 0) * ifnull(stk.unit_price, 0))), 0) as totalAmt, count(distinct stk.material_id) as materialSkuCount from stk_inventory stk left join fd_material m on m.id = stk.material_id where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and ifnull(stk.qty, 0) > 0 and (m.id is null or ((m.del_flag is null or m.del_flag != 1) and (m.is_use is null or m.is_use = '' or m.is_use != '2')))
and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}

select (select count(distinct stk.id) from stk_io_bill stk where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type = 201 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_date is not null and date(stk.bill_date) = curdate() and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} ) as todayOutboundBillCount, (select count(distinct stk.id) from stk_io_bill stk where (stk.del_flag = 0 or stk.del_flag is null) and stk.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and stk.bill_type = 101 and stk.bill_status = 2 and stk.bill_date is not null and date(stk.bill_date) = curdate() and stk.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} ) as todayInboundBillCount

select ifnull(m.code, '') as materialCode, coalesce(fn.location_id, m.location_id) as locationId from fd_material m left join wh_fixed_number fn on fn.material_id = m.id and (fn.del_flag = 0 or fn.del_flag is null) and fn.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} where (m.del_flag is null or m.del_flag != 1) and m.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and coalesce(fn.location_id, m.location_id) is not null and ifnull(m.code, '') != '' group by m.code, coalesce(fn.location_id, m.location_id)
